title: Create Ruins SMP
body:
# What is it about?

The Create Ruins SMP modpack allows you to build factories, trade with friends and fight enemies. Does your friend have a resource that you need? Trade with him, and if he doesn't agree? Blow up his base with long-range artillery guns, tanks and planes!
In version 1.1.0, we decided to focus on greater vanilla and, unlike version 1.0.5, the mods for advanced oil production (TFMG) and the mod for space (Ad Astra), the last one was deleted due to the extreme ease of creating rockets. In the future you are going to add new versions of modpack namely:
 
- **CRS Balance (The perfect balance)✅**
- ~~CRS Mini (Fewer mods = more fps)~~
- ~~CRS Techno (More modern technologies)~~
- ~~CRS Magic (More magic, RPG and the middle ages)~~
